name: Selection Sort
input:
The first line contains exactly one integer $n$ which indicates the number of integers in the array $s$. The second line contains the $n$ integers in $s=[s_0, s_1, \ldots, s_{n-1}]$.
•  $1 \le n \le 10^6$
•  For all $i$ ($0\le i  \lt  n$), $0\le s_i  \lt  2^{31}-1$.
output: Output an integer on a line, indicating the minimum cost to sort the input array $s$ of $n$ integers in non-decreasing order using Alice's function, following the rules mentioned above.
